name: Pueblo Red Chile Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil in a large kettle.
3. Reduce heat to simmer and begin cooking.
4. Meanwhile, peel and cube potatoes, add to the meat and cook until meat and potatoes are tender.
5. Measure chile powder and blue cornmeal into a bowl with enough water to make a paste.
6. Stir slowly into the stew, mix well to thicken the broth.
7. Simmer for 30 minutes and serve.
